records.summary: This is a typed pathological examination report for a digital chest X-ray (PA view) performed on a 65-year-old male patient on March 26, 2026. The report notes prominent broncho-vascular markings and normal diaphragm, hila, and cardiac size, with an impression of bronchitis.
key_observations: Findings: Prominent broncho-vascular markings, normal diaphragm and hila, normal cardiac size
Advice: Kindly Review with clinical findings
